nasb.text: “If you are not careful to observe all the words of this law which are written in this book, to fear this honored and awesome name, the Lord your God,

esv.text: “If you are not careful to do all the words of this law that are written in this book, that you may fear this glorious and awesome name, the Lord your God,

cnv.text: “如果你不謹守遵行寫在這書上的這律法的一切話，不敬畏這榮耀和可畏的名，就是耶和華你的　神，

ccb.text: “如果你们不谨遵这书上所写的一切律法，不敬畏你们的上帝耶和华那荣耀、可畏的名，
